_comment: PERSONAL FLEET template. Copy to fleet.local.json (git-ignored) to override the demo fleet.json with your own crew. To keep it FULLY OUTSIDE the repo, copy it anywhere (e.g. ~/.config/fleetchat/fleet.json) and set FLEETCHAT_FLEET_FILE to that path (and FLEETCHAT_PERSONAS_DIR to a folder of your personas). Resolution order, most-specific first: $FLEETCHAT_FLEET_FILE -> fleet.local.json -> fleet.json. Crew entries are persona NAMES only (charset-validated, never a path or command); each needs a <name>/agent.json under personas.local/ or personas/ (or your $FLEETCHAT_PERSONAS_DIR). 'lead' = the persona id that answers un-@-addressed human messages. Each agent.json holds {name, id, role, intro} plus two OPTIONAL fields that make an agent a specialist in its own project: 'dir' = the folder that agent RUNS FROM (its cwd/home repo, so its relative paths and per-project CLAUDE.md resolve there) -- keep it in the git-ignored persona config since it's a real local path; and 'cli' = which backend launches it, one of claude|gemini|qwen (default claude), so different folders can run different CLIs.
